title: Hormuz Delivers an Aluminum Shock: Analyst Reaction (Podcast)
title_cn: 霍尔木兹铝业带来冲击：分析师反应（播客）
summary: Severe disruption in the Strait of Hormuz is rippling far beyond oil markets. Around 10% of global aluminum supply is tied to the Middle East, and with exports constrained, prices are surging and supply chains are tightening. The impact will extend across the global economy as aluminum is used from cars and electronics to construction, meaning higher prices can quickly feed through to everyday goods. While the shock may not change long-term supply outlooks, it is creating near-term shortages and

title: Germany Sounded Out Possible Commerzbank White Knights This Year

title: Oil Rises as Stalled US-Iran Peace Talks Keep Hormuz Strait Shut
title_cn: 美伊和平谈判陷入僵局导致霍尔木兹海峡关闭，油价上涨
summary: Oil rose after efforts to resume peace talks over the Iran war stalled, leaving the Strait of Hormuz almost impassable and prolonging the supply disruption that has roiled global markets.

title: Sequoia and Nvidia Back Ex-DeepMind Researcher’s New AI Startup at $5.1 Billion Value
title_cn: 红杉资本和 Nvidia 以 51 亿美元的价值支持前 DeepMind 研究员的新人工智能初创公司
summary: Former Google DeepMind researcher David Silver has raised $1.1 billion for his new company, Ineffable Intelligence, in the latest example of an artificial intelligence startup securing enormous funds out of the gate.

title: The Real Rare Earth Crisis: Processing
title_cn: 真正的稀土危机：加工
summary: Critical Metals CEO Tony Sage joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the real crisis in rare earths isn’t mining, it’s processing. With the US facing a dangerous shortfall in critical minerals used for defense and AI, Sage outlines how China’s dominance, permitting delays, and limited refining capacity threaten national security, and how a global push is racing to fix it. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stock Rally Falters Near Record High as Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，股市涨势接近历史新高：市场结束
summary: A record-breaking rally in stocks took a breather as oil climbed after efforts to resume peace talks over the Iran war stalled, with traders bracing for a raft of megacap earnings and central bank decisions.

title: Hongqiao Said to Price $1.5 Billion Convertibles Near Low End
title_cn: 据称虹桥将定价 15 亿美元近低端敞篷车
summary: China Hongqiao Group Ltd. priced its 10.2 billion yuan ($1.5 billion) sale of bonds that can be converted into stock near the low end of the marketed range.

title: Mexico Credit Rating Verdict From Moody’s Expected by June End
title_cn: 穆迪预计将于 6 月底做出墨西哥信用评级裁决
summary: Mexico’s investment-grade credit rating faces a key decision by the end of June, when Moody’s Ratings is expected to resolve the negative outlook it assigned the nation in late 2024.

title: American Airlines to Sell $1.14 Billion in Bonds for 32 Planes
title_cn: 美国航空将出售 11.4 亿美元债券购买 32 架飞机
summary: American Airlines Group Inc. on Monday is selling $1.14 billion of bonds financing a group of planes.

title: Domino’s Sinks as Outlook Revised to a More Ambiguous Tone
title_cn: 多米诺骨牌因前景调整为更加模糊的基调而陷入困境
summary: Domino’s Pizza Inc. shares sunk to its lowest in almost three years after the company revised its full-year outlook and reported a first quarter comparable sales miss.

title: Walmart Plans to Sell Investment-Grade Bonds on Monday
title_cn: 沃尔玛计划周一出售投资级债券
summary: Walmart Inc. is looking to borrow at least $3 billion in a five-part dollar-denominated investment-grade bond sale, according to people familair with the matter.

title: Meme-Stock Casualty Plotkin Joins Rich Shifting Assets Into ETFs
title_cn: Meme-Stock Casualty Plotkin 加入 Rich 将资产转移至 ETF
summary: Hedge fund manager turned NBA owner Gabe Plotkin, who shut his firm after a bruising showdown with meme-stock traders, is planning to convert some of his own assets into an ETF using a tactic that’s helped a slew of wealthy investors defer tax.

title: Truist Loses Trio of Veteran Traders From Municipal Bond Team
title_cn: Truist 失去了市政债券团队的三名资深交易员
summary: Three members of Truist Financial Corp’s municipal bond department have departed the Charlotte-based bank.

title: BP Outruns Exxon to Become Top Big-Oil Stock During Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争期间英国石油公司超越埃克森美孚成为最大石油股
summary: BP Plc, long the laggard among oil supermajors, is emerging as the sector’s top stock during the Iran war as it reaps “exceptional” trading profits and avoids the scale of production outages hurting rivals like Exxon Mobil Corp.

title: Data Center Venture Bankrolled by Carlyle Co-Founder Looks to Norway’s Fjords
title_cn: 凯雷联合创始人资助的数据中心风险投资公司着眼于挪威峡湾
summary: Carlyle Group Inc. co-founder Bill Conway is backing a new venture that aims to procure land and power in Norway and sell the assets to data-center developers and technology companies.

title: Congo Plans Paramilitary Unit for Mines With US, UAE Funding
title_cn: 刚果计划在美国和阿联酋的资助下建立准军事部队
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo will create a paramilitary unit to police its mines with funding from the US and United Arab Emirates, the country’s General Inspectorate of Mines said.

title: Banks Launch $2 Billion BASF Coatings Loan Sale for Buyout
title_cn: 银行推出 20 亿美元巴斯夫涂料贷款出售以收购
summary: Banks have launched a debt sale worth over $2 billion for the auto paint and finishing division of BASF SE, amid a difficult market backdrop for the chemicals industry.

title: China Blocks Meta’s $2 Billion Acquisition of AI Firm Manus
title_cn: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能公司 Manus
summary: China has decided to block Meta Platforms Inc.’s $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal that’s drawn fire for the leakage of technology to the US.

title: Colombia Buys Back $4.4 Billion in Bonds Weeks Before Election
title_cn: 哥伦比亚在大选前几周回购 44 亿美元债券
summary: Colombia is buying back $4.4 billion in outstanding bonds, closing out its third such transaction in the last year as it looks to lower borrowing costs weeks before a pivotal presidential election.

title: Hut 8 Is Selling Bonds to Help Finance Google-Tied Data Center
title_cn: Hut 8 正在出售债券以帮助为与 Google 合作的数据中心融资
summary: A Hut 8 Corp. project is selling investment-grade bonds on Monday to fund the construction of a data center tied to Alphabet Inc.’s Google, the latest in a string of borrowing by firms spearheading the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Qualcomm Gains on Report It’s Working With OpenAI on Phone
title_cn: 高通公司因与 OpenAI 在手机领域合作而获利
summary: Qualcomm Inc. shares jumped on Monday after a closely watched tech industry analyst suggested the chipmaker is working with artificial intelligence giant OpenAI on a smartphone.

title: Using a Computer to Use My Computer
title_cn: 使用计算机来使用我的计算机
summary: AI still needs to reshape our relationship with our computers.

title: Stonepeak, Bernhard Said to Near $6 Billion Deal for Cleco Power
title_cn: Stonepeak、Bernhard 表示将以近 60 亿美元收购 Cleco Power
summary: A consortium including Macquarie Group Ltd. is nearing a deal to sell Louisiana utility Cleco Power to Stonepeak Partners LP and Bernhard Capital Partners for nearly $6 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Strategy Slows Bitcoin Buying, Switches Back to Common Sales
title_cn: 战略放缓比特币购买，转向普通销售
summary: Strategy Inc. bought $255 million of Bitcoin in the previous seven days, slowing the pace of its buying of the digital currency after spending $3.5 billion over the prior two weeks.

title: Hormuz Closure Drives Energy Investment with Olivia Wassenaar
title_cn: 霍尔木兹关闭带动 Olivia Wassenaar 的能源投资
summary: Olivia Wassenaar, Head of Apollo Infrastructure Group, discusses how the ongoing closure of the Strait of Hormuz is driving up fuel prices and accelerating investment in energy infrastructure. She highlights a growing focus on redundancy in Middle Eastern energy infrastructure, including maximizing existing pipelines, exploring new pipeline opportunities, and reconsidering alternative transport methods like rail. Globally, private capital is increasingly active in midstream, LNG, and power infrastructure projects. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Still Seeing Positive Returns on 5-6 Year Bonds: Maybank Asset Mgmt
title_cn: 马来亚银行资产管理仍看到 5-6 年期债券的正回报
summary: Maybank Asset Management's Rachana Mehta says that investors buying five to six year bonds can still get positive returns this year "just from a carry perspective." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Redwood Plans $1 Billion Fund for Long, Illiquid Credit Bets
title_cn: Redwood 计划为长期、非流动性信贷押注设立 10 亿美元基金
summary: Redwood Capital Management is seeking to raise about $1 billion for a fund built to hold illiquid credit investments with long time horizons, as complex debt maneuvers stretch out the path to restructurings.

title: Swatch Group Investor Battle Heats Up After ISS Backs Activist
title_cn: ISS 支持维权人士后，斯沃琪集团投资者之争愈演愈烈
summary: The Swatch Group AG is facing renewed investor pressure after a key proxy adviser Institutional Shareholder Services recommended shareholders support a board candidate backed by a US activist.

title: Societe Generale Eyes SRT Deal Tied to Over $10 Billion of Loans
title_cn: 法国兴业银行着眼于 SRT 交易，提供超过 100 亿美元的贷款
summary: Societe Generale SA is mulling a significant risk transfer tied to over €9 billion ($10.5 billion) of loans in what would be one of the largest such deals seen in recent years.

title: Intel Kicks Off Bond Sale to Help Buy Back Ireland Plant Stake
title_cn: 英特尔启动债券发售以帮助回购爱尔兰工厂股权
summary: Intel Corp. has kicked off the sale of investment-grade debt to help finance a $14.2 billion deal to retake full ownership of an Irish semiconductor plant.

title: US Stocks Retreat From Record High as Traders Brace for Earnings
title_cn: 由于交易员为盈利做好准备，美国股市从历史高位回落
summary: US stocks hovered near record highs with small losses on Monday, as investors prepare for a swath of corporate earnings this week while monitorinng efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz amid stalled Iran peace talks. A gauge of chip stocks sold off after a historic run.

title: Microsoft, OpenAI Sever Their Exclusive AI Pact
title_cn: 微软与 OpenAI 终止独家人工智能协议
summary: Microsoft and OpenAI have changed the terms of their deal when it comes to selling products. OpenAI can now pursue deals with cloud-computing rivals like Amazon. The revenue sharing agreement with Microsoft also changes. Ed Ludlow explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Credit Risks Are Misunderstood: Ketchum
title_cn: 私人信贷风险被误解：Ketchum
summary: Private credit isn’t cracking, it’s separating winners from losers according to Sound Point CEO Steve Ketchum. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest to argue that today’s stress comes from bad deals, not broken markets. He explains why his firm dodged software risk before AI disruption, and reveals why this shakeout could be a massive buying opportunity for disciplined investors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Breaks Free From Exclusive AI Pact With Microsoft
title_cn: OpenAI 摆脱与微软的独家人工智能协议
summary: Microsoft Corp. and OpenAI have agreed to drop the software giant’s exclusive right to sell the startup’s AI models, opening the door for the ChatGPT maker to pursue deals with cloud-computing rivals like Amazon.com Inc.

title: Apple, Google Crushed California Bill That Helped Smaller Rivals
title_cn: 苹果、谷歌粉碎了帮助较小竞争对手的加州法案
summary: Some of the world’s largest technology companies swiftly quashed a California legislative measure that pitted giants like Apple Inc. and Google against smaller rivals, a display of their immense political influence in their home state.

title: NBA Push Into Vegas, Seattle Gains Steam With Potential Bidders
title_cn: NBA 进军维加斯，西雅图吸引潜在竞标者
summary: The National Basketball Association has received signs of interest from multiple investor groups for new teams in Las Vegas and Seattle that the league plans to sell for as much as $10 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: What Happens When AIs Work Together?
title_cn: 当人工智能一起工作时会发生什么？
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, we are joined by METR's president Chris Painter and technical staff member Joel Becker. They tell Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway about the organization's focus on gauging an AI model's capability to do autonomous, complex tasks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Verizon Reports Phone Subscriber Gains Under New CEO
title_cn: Verizon 报告称，在新任首席执行官的领导下，手机用户数量有所增加
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. surprised analysts Monday when it reported a gain of mobile subscribers, an early signal that new Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman’s strategy for recapturing market share is already paying off.

title: Why China’s Affordable AI Is a Worry for Silicon Valley
title_cn: 为什么中国的人工智能负担得起，令硅谷担忧
summary: Chinese AI models are cheaper and more adaptable than the preeminent US platforms, and studies suggest they’re now almost as proficient. How did that happen?

title: Emerging Stocks an Even Better Bargain After Best Rally in Years
title_cn: 在经历了多年来的最佳反弹后，新兴股票变得更划算
summary: Emerging-market stocks are rallying three times as fast as US equities this year, and their lead may widen further if relative share valuations are any guide.

title: Nvidia-Tied Data Center Taps Junk-Debt Market for $4.5 Billion
title_cn: Nvidia 合作的数据中心利用垃圾债务市场筹集 45 亿美元
summary: A data center developer is seeking $4.54 billion in junk-debt financing for an artificial intelligence project tied to Nvidia Corp., testing investor appetite after a recent surge in offerings.

title: EBay Rival Vinted Valued at €8 Billion in Share Transaction
title_cn: eBay 竞争对手 Vinted 股票交易价值 80 亿欧元
summary: Online retailer Vinted sold shares in a secondary transaction that values the company at €8 billion ($9.4 billion), the company said on Monday.

title: Singapore Investigates Cybersecurity Incident Involving Government Contractor
title_cn: 新加坡调查涉及政府承包商的网络安全事件
summary: Singapore’s Land Transport Authority said it has suspended a government construction contractor’s access to its digital system after the company was involved in a cybersecurity incident, CNA reported.

title: Spotify Premium Now Includes Peloton Classes, Marking Push Into Fitness Content
title_cn: Spotify Premium 现在包含 Peloton 课程，标志着健身内容的进军
summary: Spotify Technology SA is now offering workout classes from Peloton Interactive Inc. to premium subscribers, marking the music streaming pioneer’s first major foray into fitness content.

title: Apollo Backs Dental Firm vVardis at $1 Billion-Plus Value
title_cn: Apollo 以超过 10 亿美元的价值支持牙科公司 vVardis
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. has invested in vVardis Holding AG, a Swiss dental firm founded by sisters Haley and Goly Abivardi.

title: Montage Profit Reaches Record as AI Chip Shipments Surge
title_cn: AI芯片出货量激增，澜起科技利润创历史新高
summary: Montage Technology Co.’s first-quarter profit reached a record, beating estimates, fueled by shipments of chips critical to AI infrastructure.

title: CATL Seeks $5 Billion in Largest HK Share Sale of 2026
title_cn: CATL寻求2026年最大规模港股出售，筹资额达50亿美元
summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. is seeking to raise about $5 billion from a Hong Kong share placement, according to terms of the deal seen by Bloomberg News, in what is the city’s largest offering yet this year.

title: Nvidia Put in Awkward Spot if Musk’s SpaceX Buys Cursor
title_cn: 如果马斯克的 SpaceX 收购 Cursor，英伟达将陷入尴尬境地
summary: Chipmaker is a booster, investor in the AI coding company.

title: Musk and Altman Head to Trial in Feud Over Future of OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克和奥特曼因 OpenAI 未来不和而受审
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman will face off this week in a trial that could determine the future of OpenAI.

title: China Cancels Meta’s $2 Billion Manus Deal
title_cn: 中国取消 Meta 20 亿美元的 Manus 交易
summary: China has decided to block Meta’s $2 billion acquisition of agentic artificial intelligence startup Manus, sending a chill through China’s burgeoning AI sector and happening weeks before a high-profile summit between US President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping. Bloomberg Intelligence's Matt Bloxham explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RBC’s Calvasina Sees US as Global Safety Trade Amid Iran War
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行的卡尔瓦辛将美国视为伊朗战争中的全球安全贸易
summary: Lori Calvasina, head of US equity strategies at RBC, doesn’t see the fallout of the conflict in the Middle East impacting the earnings of the AI and tech trade in the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany Suspects Russia Behind Cyberattack on Top Officials
title_cn: 德国怀疑俄罗斯是对高级官员进行网络攻击的幕后黑手
summary: German officials suspect Russia is behind a cyberattack that targeted top German decision makers via the Signal messaging app, according to a government official in Berlin.

title: Meta Seeks to Power Data Centers With Energy Beamed From Space
title_cn: Meta 寻求利用从太空发射的能量为数据中心供电
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is looking to power artificial intelligence data centers with solar energy collected in space, taking a novel approach to meeting its insatiable demand for electricity.

title: China Blocks Meta’s Acquisition of AI Startup Manus
title_cn: 中国阻止 Meta 收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
summary: China has decided to block Meta's $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, in a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal. The decision is likely to send a chill through China’s AI sector and emerged just weeks before a summit between US President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Italy Decides to Extradite Chinese Man US Wants for Hacking
title_cn: 意大利决定引渡美国通缉的黑客中国人
summary: The Italian government decided to extradite a Chinese man wanted by the US on hacking charges, people familiar with the matter said on Sunday.

title: Wall Street Split on Quantum Computing Bet
title_cn: 华尔街对量子计算的赌注存在分歧
summary: Experts say quantum computing can reshape areas ranging from new drug discovery to machine learning and risk modeling in finance. But it’s also thought to be still years away from offering many practical solutions. As a breakthrough proves elusive in the quest to deploy the nascent technology and boost earnings, global finance is divided on how to proceed. Bloomberg’s William Shaw reports.

title: Ex-Tokyo Electron Staff Gets Decade in Jail for TSMC Breach
title_cn: 东京电子前员工因台积电违规被判入狱十年
summary: A Taiwanese court sentenced a former Tokyo Electron Ltd. employee to 10 years in prison for stealing Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s proprietary data, highlighting growing alarm over industrial espionage involving the island’s most strategic sector.

title: Iran Foreign Minister Meets Putin With US Talks at Stalemate
title_cn: 伊朗外长会见普京，美国会谈陷入僵局
summary: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told President Vladimir Putin he’s committed to strengthening the country’s partnership with Russia, as talks with the US on ending an eight-week war remain at an impasse.

title: Budget Airlines Ask White House for $2.5 Billion Relief Plan, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，廉价航空公司向白宫请求 25 亿美元的救助计划
summary: Budget airlines are banding together to ask the Trump administration for $2.5 billion in financial assistance to help combat increasing jet fuel prices in exchange for warrants that would give the US government the right to purchase equity stakes in the carriers, people familiar with the discussions said.

title: Senator Warren Urges Feinberg to ‘Completely Cut’ Cerberus Ties
title_cn: 参议员沃伦敦促范伯格“完全切断”Cerberus 的联系
summary: Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren is calling on billionaire Stephen Feinberg to take additional steps to prevent conflicts of interest in his role as deputy defense secretary.

title: UK’s Starmer to Face Vote on Probe Into Mandelson Claims
title_cn: 英国斯塔默将面临对曼德尔森指控调查的投票
summary: Keir Starmer faces a possible investigation into whether he misled Parliament, setting up a high-stakes loyalty test with the British prime minister’s party just days before crucial local elections.

title: White House to Discuss Presidential Safety After Dinner Shooting
title_cn: 白宫将在晚餐枪击事件后讨论总统安全
summary: The White House will convene a meeting early this week to discuss safety measures for major events involving President Donald Trump, following Saturday’s shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner that spurred fresh scrutiny of security practices.

title: Trump Being ‘Humiliated’ in Iran Talks, German Leader Says
title_cn: 德国领导人称特朗普在伊朗会谈中受到“羞辱”
summary: The US is being “humiliated” by Iranian leaders as President Donald Trump struggles to negotiate an end to the war, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said in comments that risk driving a further wedge in transatlantic relations.

title: Canada Launches Sovereign Wealth Fund for Major Projects
title_cn: 加拿大为重大项目启动主权财富基金
summary: Canada will create its first sovereign wealth fund to provide financing for large infrastructure projects, Prime Minister Mark Carney said.

title: Hungary’s Magyar Rejects Billionaire Orban Ally’s Outreach
title_cn: 匈牙利马扎尔拒绝亿万富翁欧尔班盟友的外展
summary: Hungary’s incoming Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar rejected a request from billionaire Lorinc Meszaros - a close business ally of outgoing leader Viktor Orban - for talks aimed at containing damage to his business empire, even as the stock price of Meszaros’s flagship conglomerate Opus Nyrt. continued its free-fall.

title: Romanian Ex-Ruling Party Joins Far-Right Bid to Oust Premier
title_cn: 罗马尼亚前执政党加入极右翼阵营推翻总理
summary: Romania’s former top ruling party will join the far-right opposition in a attempt to topple the prime minister, Ilie Bolojan, in the latest escalation of the political crisis that threatens to derail efforts to cut the European Union’s widest budget gap.

title: German Finance Ministry Leaves Door Open for Lifting Debt Brake
title_cn: 德国财政部为解除债务刹车敞开大门
summary: Germany’s Finance Ministry signaled it’s ready to consider suspending debt restrictions as an emergency step with Europe’s largest economy bracing for the impact of the war in Iran.

title: Stalled US-Iran Talks Show Limits of Pakistan Mediation Push
title_cn: 美伊谈判陷入僵局显示巴基斯坦调解努力的局限性
summary: The US and Iran failed to kick off a second round of peace talks this weekend despite a last-minute push by Pakistan, delivering a blow to Islamabad’s efforts to broker a settlement to end the two-month-old war.

title: Iran-Linked Oil Tankers Sail West After Boarding by US
title_cn: 与伊朗有关的油轮在美国登船后向西航行
summary: Two Iran-linked oil tankers that US forces interdicted near Sri Lanka last week are now sailing west.

title: Dual Hormuz Blockade Cuts Ship Transits to Near Zero
title_cn: 霍尔木兹双重封锁使船舶过境量几乎为零
summary: US forces board the Majestic X tanker in the Indian Ocean, in a still from video released by the US Department of Defense, on April 23. Source: @DeptofWar

title: New Chile Leader Faces Codelco Dilemma: Dividends or Debt Relief
title_cn: 智利新任领导人面临Codelco困境：股息还是债务减免
summary: Chile’s new right-wing leader faces a tough choice: continue using state-owned Codelco as a cash cow to bolster state coffers, or allow the copper giant to retain more profit so it can issue less debt.

title: Starmer Pledges to End Shoplifting ‘Free-for-All’ in the UK
title_cn: 斯塔默承诺结束英国“混战”商店行窃行为
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said the UK will toughen measures to tackle shoplifting and violence against shop staff, after complaints from retailers including Marks & Spencer Group Plc about the scale of the problem.

title: Al-Qaeda Branch Kills Mali Defense Chief in Suicide Attack
title_cn: 基地组织分支在自杀式袭击中杀死马里国防部长
summary: Mali’s defense minister was killed in a suicide attack on his home on Saturday, during a coordinated assault by an al-Qaeda affiliate across several locations in the West African country.

title: Why the UK Has a Shoplifting Problem
title_cn: 为什么英国存在入店行窃问题
summary: The UK’s increase in shoplifting didn’t happen in a vacuum. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Matthew Brooker explains what happened — and how to fix it. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sergey Brin Confronted Gavin Newsom at a Treehouse Party — Then Launched a Political War
title_cn: 谢尔盖·布林在树屋派对上与加文·纽瑟姆对峙——随后发动政治战争
summary: In a treehouse nestled in redwoods north of San Francisco, California Governor Gavin Newsom stood cold and hungry as Sergey Brin, the world’s fourth-richest man, and his wellness-influencer girlfriend told him they were leaving the state.

title: Washington DC Gala Shooting Suspect Due in Court
title_cn: 华盛顿特区晚会枪击案嫌疑人将出庭受审
summary:
The man accused of storming the White House Correspondents Dinner is set to be arraigned in a federal court in Washington Monday.

Cole Tomas Allen, 31, was arrested after shots were fired at the hotel where the event was taking place, forcing Donald Trump and senior officials to take cover. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House Press Dinner Attack Adds to Tally of Political Violence
title_cn: 白宫新闻晚宴袭击增加了政治暴力的数量
summary: Everyone in the room Saturday night had a story

title: India, New Zealand Sign ‘Once-in-a-Generation’ Trade Deal
title_cn: 印度与新西兰签署“一代人一次”的贸易协议
summary: India and New Zealand have signed a free-trade agreement that slashes tariffs on most goods and expands market access, as tensions in the Middle East weigh on global commerce.

title: Charles Brings Calm Diplomacy to Trump’s Pomp
title_cn: 查尔斯为特朗普的盛况带来冷静的外交
summary: Relations between the UK and the US are at their lowest ebb in decades.

title: Fed to Hold Interest Rates as Political Drama Overshadows Policy Debate
title_cn: 政治戏剧掩盖政策辩论，美联储将维持利率不变
summary: Federal Reserve officials are expected to leave interest rates unchanged this week at a gathering that’s being overshadowed by the latest twists in a political drama surrounding the leadership handover at the US central bank.

title: Iran's Araghchi Arrives in Russia as US Talks Stall
title_cn: 美国谈判陷入僵局，伊朗领导人阿拉格奇抵达俄罗斯
summary: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Russia on Monday for a meeting with President Vladimir Putin. Araghchi said he needed to coordinate with Russian officials after the US-Israeli military campaign against the Islamic Republic disrupted bilateral meetings, according to a statement posted on the foreign ministry’s Telegram channel. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru’s Presidency Falls to New Low: Executive Branch ‘Is a Joke’
title_cn: 秘鲁总统任期跌至新低：行政部门“是个笑话”
summary: The job has all of the trappings of power but none of the actual authority. One false move can lead to a public and unceremonious firing — and possibly a jail term.
